title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced updates to its agent platform including a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with Agent Builder featuring no-code/low-code design, new Agent Registry for component distribution, and enterprise governance features. The platform includes an expanded Agent Development Kit, agent-to-agent communication, secure code execution sandbox, advanced observability, evaluation suite, and managed simulation capabilities.
writeup: This video covers Google Cloud's updates to its agent platform, centered on a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. Agent Builder adds no-code and low-code design, a new Agent Registry handles component distribution, and the release includes enterprise governance features. The expanded Agent Development Kit brings agent-to-agent communication, a secure code execution sandbox, advanced observability, an evaluation suite, and managed simulation capabilities, signaling a push toward production multi-agent systems with built-in tooling for orchestration, testing, and monitoring.
